name: Gottsumon

signature_move.name: Angry Rock
signature_move.description: Shoots super-hard ore from the top of its head.

description: An Ore Digimon that is clad in ore data from the fields that has high defenses. With its mischievous and cheerful personality, it brings low generation Digimon along with it as if it were a ringleader, and is a live wire that jumps about in the system. It is sometimes a bit selfish, and once it is angered, it goes on a violent rampage like a volcanic eruption, becoming unstoppable. The ore data it expresses varies depending on the conditions and place of its origin, and it has the potential for various evolutions. Its Special Move is shooting super-hard ore from the top of its head ( Angry Rock ).
